title: Nordic Holds
body:
Candy Ocean Productions Presents

**IMPORTANT: This mod requires Geckolib. Please show them some support!** **Dive into a world of rugged beauty and ancient lore with Nordic Holds, an immersive mod that brings the spirit of the North to your Minecraft world. This expansion seamlessly integrates a collection of Nordic and Viking-inspired structures, mobs, and blocks, making snowy biomes more vibrant and full of adventure.** **Features:** - **Viking-Inspired Structures:** Discover detailed, custom-built structures designed to feel like a natural part of the game. Explore and loot them, or use them as a foundation for your very own stronghold. - **Unique Mobs & Loot:** Encounter new, custom-designed mobs with their own unique loot tables. - **New Blocks:** Expand your building palette with custom blocks perfect for constructing your own Nordic-themed bases, longhouses, and keeps. **Structures Added So Far:** - Nord House 1 & 2 - Hollow Spike - Viking Shipwreck - Torch Rune - Nordic Tower 1 - Dining Hall --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**We use Mcreator and encourage others to support it:** [![MCreator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6d96a4edbe8f1d4504076af96fc076a0125ef4c.png)](https://mcreator.net/)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
(75% of all Candy Ocean Productions Donations go to Funding Projects)
